bio: Full Stack Developer based in Meerut, associated with Hira Times. I bridge the gap between cutting-edge UI/UX design and high-performance full-stack development.

projects.title: Aura-jewelry
projects.uxProblemSolved: Creating a seamless shopping experience emphasizing a modern, minimalist 'Quiet Luxury' editorial aesthetic.

projects.title: hiratimes.com
projects.uxProblemSolved: Enhancing readable consumption of dense news and journalistic content through clean, scalable layouts.

projects.title: drop-it
projects.uxProblemSolved: Simplifying seamless file drops and cross-device sharing via minimal, low-friction interactions.

projects.title: Indian-Stock-Screener
projects.uxProblemSolved: Visualizing complex stock market fundamentals and comparisons seamlessly without dashboard clutter.
